query: ( "heat health warning system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat health action plan"[Title/Abstract] OR "biometeorological forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather-based health alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat health protection"[Title/Abstract] OR "forecast-triggered"[Title/Abstract] OR "threshold-based activation"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature threshold"[Title/Abstract] OR "alert level"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat wave warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme heat alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "Hot Temperature"[MeSH Terms] ) AND ( "excess mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "excess deaths"[Title/Abstract] OR "attributable mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "attributable fraction"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-attributable"[Title/Abstract] OR "cardiorespiratory"[Title/Abstract] OR "hospital admission"[Title/Abstract] OR "emergency department"[Title/Abstract] OR "ambulance call"[Title/Abstract] OR "syndromic surveillance"[Title/Abstract] OR "Mortality"[MeSH Terms] OR "Hospitalization"[MeSH Terms] ) AND ( "causal inference"[Title/Abstract] OR "policy evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment effect"[Title/Abstract] OR "synthetic control"[Title/Abstract] OR "event study"[Title/Abstract] OR "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference in differences"[Title/Abstract] OR "interrupted time series"[Title/Abstract] OR "counterfactual"[Title/Abstract] OR "climate adaptation effectiveness"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title/Abstract] ) AND ( "urban heat"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat vulnerability"[Title/Abstract] OR "environmental health governance"[Title/Abstract] OR "climate-health"[Title/Abstract] OR "public health intervention"[Title/Abstract] OR "Climate Change"[MeSH Terms] OR "Environmental Health"[MeSH Terms] OR "Hot Temperature"[MeSH Terms] )
